row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward movement along a city street with slight rightward drift or lane change indicated by trajectory lines.

semantic.scene_summary: Urban street scene during rainy weather. The view includes wet asphalt roads, multi-story buildings, sidewalks, traffic lights, and various road users.
semantic.visibility_notes: Visibility is reduced due to rain and overcast conditions. Reflections on the wet road surface are prominent.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Motion appears continuous and natural. Vehicles move smoothly according to traffic flow. The pedestrian walks steadily along the sidewalk.
logical.object_continuity: Objects remain visible and consistent throughout the frames without sudden appearance or disappearance.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry and building structures remain stable and coherent across frames.

decision.ego_behavior_description: The ego vehicle appears to be moving forward steadily through an intersection or along a straight segment of the road.
decision.risk_context: Wet road conditions may increase stopping distances. Presence of pedestrians and other vehicles requires standard caution.
